title: Lot 3 — vault path, explain, communautés
author: Claude Code (Haiku 4.5)
scope: Vault feature completion — three core commands
summary: Implements vault path (BFS shortest path), vault explain (node descriptions), and automatic community detection in graph.json
commits: 40ebd1c feat(vault): ajoute vault path — BFS plus court chemin entre nœuds

code_quality.test_coverage: Comprehensive — path nominal/edge cases, explain text/JSON, community detection, error handling
review_focus: BFS algorithm correctness for bidirectional graphs
Node lookup flexibility (exact ID vs partial label match)
JSON output format consistency with existing commands

implementation_summary.vault_path: BFS-based shortest path calculator. Nodes resolved by exact ID or partial label match. Handles both forward and reverse edges for undirected semantics. Supports --json output.
implementation_summary.vault_explain: Natural language generator for nodes. Lists all incoming/outgoing neighbors with edge labels. Supports --json output with structured neighbor data.
implementation_summary.communities: Connected components detection via BFS. Each node enriched with community ID. Graph stats include community count and byId breakdown.

next_steps: Plan Phase C (graphe minimal enhancements) or next feature
risks: BFS performance on large graphs (mitigated by test coverage)
Node lookup ambiguity if multiple labels match (resolved by exact ID priority)
Community detection correctness (verified by connected component tests)
